---
title: "failures"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-10"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

Failures from the process_strategies.r
724 Mattawa... Complex structure returned gibberish.

Somehow the api is reading data from hospitals outside of Ontario.
Example if I pass the Strategic plan for hospital 826, Lake of the woods.
I get back data from Henderson Hospital. which is somewhere in the US
if I pass 826 as a specific through the Process_strategies.R software
I get Eastern New Mexico Medical


MOVING TO A PURE API TO READ PDF AND SCANNED PDF SOLVED THE ABVOE PROBLEMS
WHICH WERE HALLUCINATIONS.

Dealing with partnerships that duplicate strategies.
Mississip river  alliance 3duplications 2 hospitals. 2 fac 1 name??? 16 differnt 
Identical input for both 
597=  4 lines in df
626= 12 lines in df
Same data represented twice. BUT in 597 data in "strategic Plan Priorities" rolled up into one text with <br> and 626 broke the priorties out. 
All Data Captured

Mics Group another partnership  but all treated the same

Blanche River partnership with seperte fac
huron health
huron perth


In some cases the API breaks actions apart into separate lines and in some it does not 
Quinte it did
but the classic is 597 which rolled up the actions, and 626 which didn't even though the plans are identical (partnership)


FAC (736) for southlake didn't come across but name and all other data did.
it also failed in a select test run with the controller
Data was updated in the DF file. 
FAC 800 was not properly presented in the strategic plan section I have asked for a copy to be mailed to me. 
Until then the plan is deleted
